Declaration_Symbol : constant Symset :=

  (PROCEDURE_Symbol |
   FUNCTION_Symbol  => True,
   others           => False);

constants.code:
Declaration_X_Subprogram_Symbol : constant Symset :=
  (IDent          |
   PACKAGE_Symbol |
   …
   others         => False);

Scalar_Set : constant Typ_Set :=
  (Ints | Floats | Durations | Chars | Bools | Enums => True, others => False);

constants.name: Selector_Symbol
constants.code:
Selector_Symbol : constant Symset :=
  (LParent | Period => True, others => False);

constants.name: Selector_Symbol_Loose

Selector_Symbol_Loose : constant Symset :=

  BEGIN_Symbol   |
  …
  others         => False);

constants.name: Str_Lit_Set

constants.name: Subtype_Begin_Symbol
constants.code:
Subtype_Begin_Symbol : constant Symset :=

  NOT_Symbol => True,
  others     => False);

Symbols_after_Subprogram_Identifier : constant Symset :=

   => True,
   others => False);

constants.code: Text_Files_Set   : constant Typ_Set := (Text_Files          => True, others => False);

constants.name: Text_IO_Get_Item_Set
constants.code: Text_IO_Get_Item_Set        : constant Typ_Set := (Standard_Set and not Bools_Set) or Arrays_Set;

constants.name: Times_Set
constants.code: Times_Set        : constant Typ_Set := (Times               => True, others => False);

constants.name: Type_Begin_Symbol
constants.code:
Type_Begin_Symbol : constant Symset :=

  DIGITS_Symbol | DELTA_Symbol |
  …
  others         => False);

constants.name: VStrings_Set
constants.code: VStrings_Set     : constant Typ_Set := (VStrings            => True, others => False);
